name: RABBIT-BACKLOG-BACKLOG-2
title: Audit rabbit-backlog skill trigger reliability: does it auto-fire on fresh session for 'file a backlog item' intent?

history.note: Same class as RABBIT-BUG-5 (refused). Concern was symlink-based skill loading preventing auto-fire on fresh session. Resolved by rabbit-cage switching generate-skills-dir.sh to copy mode (v2.0.0). Skills confirmed loading correctly via /reload-plugins. Audit no longer needed.
